rules: This branch only manages AGENTS.md under Mother_Doc docs.
scan must inspect product-side AGENTS.md state without rewriting content.
collect must consume scan_report.json and copy current AGENTS.md files back into the skill-side registry.
push must regenerate AGENTS.md from the skill-side template and refresh the registry again.
This branch is still inside mother_doc stage and must not perform implementation or evidence actions.
